title: eriogonum nealleyi
intro: Eriogonum nealleyi, also known as Nealey's buckwheat, is a flowering plant species in the buckwheat family that is native to the south-central United States. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum nealleyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial activity. Eriogonum nealleyi can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a valuable plant in traditional herbal medicine.
